# ErrorDataPolicy enumeration

Whether a code's `data` shape is normative (fixed by the spec) or sender-defined (the sender MAY attach any structure). (R-22.1-k, R-22.3-a)

```csharp
public enum ErrorDataPolicy
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Normative | `0` | The `data` shape is fixed by the spec and carries the keys in [`DataKeys`](./ErrorCodeRegistryEntry/DataKeys.md). |
| SenderDefined | `1` | The sender MAY attach any (or no) structured `data`. |
